title: Toggleable Sonic Boom
description: This mod adds a option to enable/disable the Wardens Sonic Boom Attack
body:
This mod adds a option to enable/disable the Wardens Sonic Boom Attack

 

Fabric:

To enable the Sonic boom with the Fabric Version you need to run the command /gamerule DoSonicBoom true
To disable the Sonic boom with the Fabric Version you need to run the command /gamerule DoSonicBoom false
By Default the value is set to true, You can also change the Value when creating a world in the GameRules Option

The Fabric Version requires Fabric API

 

Forge: 

To enable the Sonic boom with the Forge Version you need to run the command /gamerule CanWardenSonicBoom true
To disable the Sonic boom with the Forge Version you need to run the command /gamerule CanWardenSonicBoom false
By Default the value is set to true, You can also change the Value when creating a world in the GameRules Option

 


If you have any suggestions please let me know and i will look into them :)

 

You can use code "Belgie" for 25% off your first month when buying any Minecraft service with Winternode Servers
